utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format includes 5 items: (1) health_coverage (physical and mental health insurance with costs), (2) property_coverage (home/contents insurance with costs), (3) travel_coverage (travel insurance with costs), (4) additional_services (enhancement services with costs), and (5) total_budget (monthly/annual cost breakdown). In the final coverage plan, all five items appear. Each item includes detailed specifications: health_coverage lists physical and mental health with costs; property_coverage includes home/contents and costs; travel_coverage specifies global coverage details and costs; additional_services lists extra services and costs; total_budget provides a cost breakdown. Therefore, all 5 of 5 items are fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists 'LifeFirst' as the provider for health, property, and travel coverage. In the ground-truth ratings, the following corresponding options exist: 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' for both physical and mental health, 'LifeFirst Standard Coverage' for property (home contents, personal belongings, electronics), and 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' for travel. The additional services include 'premium_membership' (€20/month) and 'travel_assistance_service' (€150/month), which correspond to 'Premium Insurance Membership' and '24/7 Travel Assistance' respectively in the ground-truth ratings. Therefore, each selected item can be mapped directly to its rating from the ground-truth data.
